generated_for: Haffner Tech AI Workflow Training — Exercise 1 (simulated inbox)

emails.subject: Re: Homepage draft 2 — a couple of thoughts
emails.snippet: Love where this is going. Two things on the hero section before we sign off…
emails.body: Hi! Love where this is going. Two things before we sign off on draft 2: (1) can the hero headline be a touch shorter, and (2) the testimonial block feels low-contrast on mobile. Could you send an updated version by Friday? Thanks!

emails.subject: Homepage draft 2
emails.snippet: Thanks for sending draft 2 over — reviewing with the team today.
emails.body: Thanks for sending draft 2 over — reviewing with the team today, I'll get you notes shortly.

emails.subject: Following up after our call
emails.snippet: Really enjoyed our conversation. Could you put together a proposal for the scope we discussed?
emails.body: Really enjoyed our conversation Tuesday. Could you put together a proposal for the scope we discussed (the two landing pages + the email sequence)? No rush, but I'd like to bring it to our team meeting next week.

emails.subject: Thanks for the call
emails.snippet: Thanks for making time today — will loop back after I sync with my partner.
emails.body: Thanks for making time today — will loop back after I sync with my partner.

emails.subject: Your Lumen renewal quote (action needed by Jun 30)
emails.snippet: Attaching your renewal. Pricing holds through the end of the month.
emails.body: Hi — attaching your renewal quote for the analytics seats. Pricing holds through June 30; after that it moves to the new rate. Let me know if you'd like to keep all five seats or adjust.

emails.subject: Quick question about seats
emails.snippet: Are all five seats still active on your side?
emails.body: Quick one before I send the renewal — are all five seats still active on your side?

emails.subject: Re: the export bug — still seeing it
emails.snippet: Tried again this morning and the CSV export still times out on large reports.
emails.body: Morning — tried again and the CSV export still times out on the large reports (the small ones are fine). Is there anything on my end I should change, or is it still being worked on? Thanks for your patience.

emails.subject: Co-marketing idea for Q3
emails.snippet: I have an idea for a joint webinar — want to grab 20 minutes next week?
emails.body: Hey! I have an idea for a joint webinar in Q3 — our audiences overlap nicely. Want to grab 20 minutes next week to talk it through? I'm pretty open Wed/Thu.

emails.subject: Q3 numbers when you get a sec
emails.snippet: Can you send the Q3 marketing spend summary before Friday's review?
emails.body: Hey — can you send the Q3 marketing spend summary before Friday's review? Just the topline by channel is fine.

emails.subject: Issue 142: The 'boring' channel that's quietly winning
emails.snippet: Plus: a 3-step teardown of a great onboarding email.
emails.body: This week: the channel everyone underrates, a teardown of a great onboarding email, and one chart on retention. (Newsletter — no action needed.)

emails.subject: Your receipt from Figma

emails.body: Hi there, we help agencies like yours 10x pipeline with our outbound system — open to a quick chat this week? (Cold outreach.)
